cliUsageGuide.title: 1. Find the strongest Hyperliquid traders
cliUsageGuide.reason: Seeds the board with traders who already proved they can survive over time.

cliUsageGuide.title: 2. Reconstruct how they actually win
cliUsageGuide.reason: Turns raw fills into hold windows, large-bet win rate, patience, and campaign history.

cliUsageGuide.title: 3. Pull their live exposure
cliUsageGuide.reason: Shows current open positions, live size, unrealized PnL, adds, and concentration.

cliUsageGuide.title: 4. Measure trader consistency, not just headline PnL
cliUsageGuide.reason: Adds daily edge, profitable-day share, and downside context so a lucky heater does not look equal to a steady operator.

cliUsageGuide.title: 5. Pull symbol-level perp context
cliUsageGuide.reason: Adds market regime context like OI expansion, funding heat, crowding risk, and whether the wallet cluster has a decent tape behind it.

cliUsageGuide.title: 6. Downrank fake edge from tiny samples
cliUsageGuide.command: board logic: rebuild campaigns + Wilson-trust the win rate
cliUsageGuide.reason: The site does not trust raw percentages blindly. It reconstructs campaigns from CLI fills and lowers confidence when the sample is tiny.

cliUsageGuide.title: 7. Compare snapshots instead of staring at one frame
cliUsageGuide.command: board logic: archive refreshes + compute reinforcement / fading
cliUsageGuide.reason: A setup matters more when size, confluence, and fresh adds are improving over multiple refreshes, not just because it looked good once.
